title: phoebe estrellensis
intro: Phoebe estrellensis, also known as Estrella Phoebe or Star Phoebe, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, belonging to the Lauraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal activities. Estrella Phoebe is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves can also be used in herbal infusions or as a topical application for skin conditions.
